messages.content:
4. Order Value:

4. Order Value:
4.1 The total value for the above-mentioned scope of supply and deliverables under this Order shall be INR
67,73,200/-(Rupees Sixty-seven Lakh Seventy-Three Thousand Two Hundred Only) (hereinafter referred to as
"Order Value"). The above Order Value inclusive Goods and Service Tax (GST). The Order Value is inclusive of
Goods and Services Tax (GST).
4.2 The Order Value is based on basic Unit Price as mentioned hereof, which shall remain firm for the entire
period during which the Material(s) are supplied and the scope of supply and deliverables under this Order are
completed / performed. No escalation on any account shall be permitted for the aforesaid period or till the end of
the extended period, if any.

24. Termination:

24. Termination: -
24.1 In the event of a default or failure to comply with the terms, conditions, Material Specifications and
requirements set out under this Order by the Supplier, to the Buyers satisfaction, the Buyer may, without
prejudice to any other rights it may possess under this Order, give a notice to the Supplier stating the nature of
the default and require the Supplier to remedy the same. If the Supplier fails to remedy or to take steps to
remedy the same within fourteen (14) days of its receipt of such notice, then the Buyer may terminate the Order
forthwith on account of cause.
24.2 The Buyer also reserves the right to terminate the Order with a written notice of fourteen (14) days, in the
event:
(i) Supplier is unable to pay its debts or becomes insolvent, or an order or resolution is passed for dissolution /
winding up of the Supplier.
(ii) Supplier fails to comply with Applicable Laws, or obtain / maintain any license, consent, permit, approval
required under Applicable Laws for performance of this Order.
(iii)Supplier assigns this Order or any of its rights and obligations hereunder to a third party without prior written
consent of the Buyer.
(iv)Supplier fails to meet the representations and warranties made by it under this Order or they are found to be
false or incorrect.
24.2.1 Upon receipt of the notice of termination the Supplier shall at its own cost, either immediately or upon
such date as is specified in the notice of termination,
24.2.1.1 Cease all further supplies, except for such supply as the Buyer may specify in the notice of termination
for the sole purpose of protecting that part of the supplies already executed. Terminate all Subcontracts, except
those to be assigned to the Buyer pursuant to paragraph below.
24.2.1.2 deliver to the Buyer the parts of the supplies executed by the Supplier up to the date of termination.
24.2.1.3 assign to the Buyer all right, title and benefit of the Supplier in respect of the supplied items as on the
date of termination and as may be required by the Buyer pursuant to any Subcontracts executed between the
Supplier and its Sub Suppliers.
24.2.1.4 Deliver to the Buyer all documents prepared by the Supplier as on the date of termination in connection
with the material and return all Buyers documents including copies thereof in its possession.
24.2.2 The Supplier shall be entitled to be paid such amount towards the Order Value, for which the supply of
Material(s) has been completed in accordance with this Order and to the satisfaction of the Buyer, as of the date
of termination. Any sums due to the Buyer from the Supplier accruing prior to the date of termination shall be
deducted from the amount to be paid to the Supplier under this Order.
24.2.3 The Buyer may terminate this Order for convenience at any point of time by giving the Supplier a written
notice of thirty (30) days, to this effect. Clauses 24.2.1 and 24.2.2 shall apply mutatis mutandis to give effect
to such termination under this Clause.
24.2.4 Surviving Obligations: - The termination of this Order:
(i) shall not relieve the Supplier of its obligations with respect to the confidentiality of information as set
forth in this Order,
(ii) shall not relieve the Supplier of any obligation herein that is expressly stated to survive termination,
(iii) shall not limit or affect any provision of the Order expressly limiting the liability of the Supplier or releasing
the Supplier from any liability, and
(iv) shall not relieve the Supplier of any obligations or liabilities relating to indemnity, warranty and latent defect
arising under this Order on or before the date of such termination.

4. Order Value:

4. Order Value:
4.1 The total value for the above-mentioned scope of supply and deliverables under this Order shall be INR
67,73,200/-(Rupees Sixty-seven Lakh Seventy-Three Thousand Two Hundred Only) (hereinafter referred to as
"Order Value"). The above Order Value inclusive Goods and Service Tax (GST). The Order Value is inclusive of
Goods and Services Tax (GST).
4.2 The Order Value is based on basic Unit Price as mentioned hereof, which shall remain firm for the entire
period during which the Material(s) are supplied and the scope of supply and deliverables under this Order are
completed / performed. No escalation on any account shall be permitted for the aforesaid period or till the end of
the extended period, if any.

24. Termination:

24. Termination: -
24.1 In the event of a default or failure to comply with the terms, conditions, Material Specifications and
requirements set out under this Order by the Supplier, to the Buyers satisfaction, the Buyer may, without
prejudice to any other rights it may possess under this Order, give a notice to the Supplier stating the nature of
the default and require the Supplier to remedy the same. If the Supplier fails to remedy or to take steps to
remedy the same within fourteen (14) days of its receipt of such notice, then the Buyer may terminate the Order
forthwith on account of cause.
24.2 The Buyer also reserves the right to terminate the Order with a written notice of fourteen (14) days, in the
event:
(i) Supplier is unable to pay its debts or becomes insolvent, or an order or resolution is passed for dissolution /
winding up of the Supplier.
(ii) Supplier fails to comply with Applicable Laws, or obtain / maintain any license, consent, permit, approval
required under Applicable Laws for performance of this Order.
(iii)Supplier assigns this Order or any of its rights and obligations hereunder to a third party without prior written
consent of the Buyer.
(iv)Supplier fails to meet the representations and warranties made by it under this Order or they are found to be
false or incorrect.
24.2.1 Upon receipt of the notice of termination the Supplier shall at its own cost, either immediately or upon
such date as is specified in the notice of termination,
24.2.1.1 Cease all further supplies, except for such supply as the Buyer may specify in the notice of termination

24.2.1.2 deliver to the Buyer the parts of the supplies executed by the Supplier up to the date of termination.

24.2.2 The Supplier shall be entitled to be paid such amount towards the Order Value, for which the supply of

24.2.3 The Buyer may terminate this Order for convenience at any point of time by giving the Supplier a written
notice of thirty (30) days, to this effect. Clauses 24.2.1 and 24.2.2 shall apply mutatis mutandis to give effect
to such termination under this Clause.
24.2.4 Surviving Obligations: - The termination of this Order:
(i) shall not relieve the Supplier of its obligations with respect to the confidentiality of information as set
forth in this Order,
(ii) shall not relieve the Supplier of any obligation herein that is expressly stated to survive termination,
(iii) shall not limit or affect any provision of the Order expressly limiting the liability of the Supplier or releasing
the Supplier from any liability, and
(iv) shall not relieve the Supplier of any obligations or liabilities relating to indemnity, warranty and latent defect
arising under this Order on or before the date of such termination.

12. Insurance:

12. Insurance: -
12.1 The Supplier shall at his own expense take out and maintain in effect, during the performance of this Order,
the insurances set forth below in the sums and with the deductibles and other conditions specified herein.
12.2 The Supplier will arrange for transit insurance of material included under the scope of this Order, to cover
all risks during the Material transit (regardless of mode of transportation) between Suppliers manufacturing facility
/ warehouse and designated delivery location.
12.3 The insurance shall be on full replacement value basis (including transit and insurance cost) covering entire
material value with no escalation cost.
12.4 The Buyer shall also be named as co-insured under the insurance policy taken out by the Supplier except
for third party liability.
12.5 Notwithstanding the insurance requirements mentioned above, it would be the Suppliers responsibility to take
and maintain adequate insurance cover. If at any point of time during execution of the Order, the insurance
policies are found to be inadequate, the Supplier shall take fresh insurance policies meeting aforesaid
requirements, to the satisfaction of the Buyer.
12.6 Any risk of loss or damage to the Material(s), material and/or spares during loading, transportation and until
safe delivery of the Material(s) in accordance with this Order, at the designated delivery location, shall be to the
account of the Supplier. The Supplier shall be responsible for preference of all claims and make good the
damages or loss by way of repairs and/or replacement of Material(s) damaged or lost. Notwithstanding the extent
of insurances cover and the amount of claim available from the underwriter, the Supplier shall be liable to make
good the full replacement/rectification of all the Material(s) and shall ensure their availability as per ordered
requirement without any additional financial liability to the Buyer.

12. Insurance:

12. Insurance: -
12.1 The Supplier shall at his own expense take out and maintain in effect, during the performance of this Order,
the insurances set forth below in the sums and with the deductibles and other conditions specified herein.
12.2 The Supplier will arrange for transit insurance of material included under the scope of this Order, to cover
all risks during the Material transit (regardless of mode of transportation) between Suppliers manufacturing facility
/ warehouse and designated delivery location.
12.3 The insurance shall be on full replacement value basis (including transit and insurance cost) covering entire
material value with no escalation cost.
12.4 The Buyer shall also be named as co-insured under the insurance policy taken out by the Supplier except
for third party liability.
12.5 Notwithstanding the insurance requirements mentioned above, it would be the Suppliers responsibility to take
and maintain adequate insurance cover. If at any point of time during execution of the Order, the insurance
policies are found to be inadequate, the Supplier shall take fresh insurance policies meeting aforesaid
requirements, to the satisfaction of the Buyer.
12.6 Any risk of loss or damage to the Material(s), material and/or spares during loading, transportation and until
safe delivery of the Material(s) in accordance with this Order, at the designated delivery location, shall be to the
account of the Supplier. The Supplier shall be responsible for preference of all claims and make good the
damages or loss by way of repairs and/or replacement of Material(s) damaged or lost. Notwithstanding the extent
of insurances cover and the amount of claim available from the underwriter, the Supplier shall be liable to make
good the full replacement/rectification of all the Material(s) and shall ensure their availability as per ordered
requirement without any additional financial liability to the Buyer.

General:

General: -
27.1 Any amendment to this Order will only be with the mutual agreement of the Parties, shall be in writing and
signed by authorized representatives of the Parties.
27.2 This Order does not in any respect make the Supplier an agent or a partner of the Buyer, nor does it
establish any joint venture between the Parties or authorize the Supplier to transact any business in the name of
the Buyer or to incur any obligation or liability for or on behalf of the Buyer.
27.3 Each Party confirms that it is acting on its own behalf and not for the benefit of any other Party.
Notwithstanding this, all affiliates of Buyer and IndiGrid Investment Managers Limited (IIML) shall be entitled to
benefit from this Order. If any provision or part-provision of this Order is or becomes invalid, illegal or
unenforceable, it shall be deemed modified to the minimum extent necessary to make it valid, legal and
enforceable. If such modification is not possible, the relevant provision or part-provision shall be deemed deleted.
Any modification to or deletion of a provision or part-provision under this Clause shall only take effect in
accordance with Clause 27.1 of this Order and shall not affect the validity and enforceability of the rest of this
Order.
27.4 Failure or delay of either Party at any time to require performance of any provision of this Order shall not
affect the right to require full performance thereof at any time thereafter and the waiver by either Party of a
breach of any provision shall not be taken or held to be a waiver of any subsequent breach thereof or as
nullifying or restricting the effectiveness of such provision.
27.5 This Order, including and together with any related annexures, sets forth the entire agreement and
understanding between the Parties with respect to the subject matter hereof and supersedes and cancels all
earlier discussions and negotiations of understandings, agreements, representations, warranties, whether written or
oral, express or implied, between them excluding any specific assumptions to price as maybe notified by the
Buyer to the Supplier.
